scenarios.title: Reinforcement Learning Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Gymnasium or PettingZoo reinforcement learning tasks, evolutionary hyperparameter optimization, AgileRL algorithms, replay buffers, vectorized environments, offline RL, contextual bandits, and RL training scripts.
scenarios.role: AgileRL-specific guidance for building, debugging, and validating reinforcement learning workflows with evolvable algorithms and population-based HPO.
scenarios.read_when: Use for tasks naming AgileRL, agilerl, PPO/DQN/RainbowDQN/DDPG/TD3/CQL/ILQL/NeuralUCB/NeuralTS/MADDPG/MATD3/IPPO in AgileRL, create_population, Mutations, TournamentSelection, EvolvableModule, AsyncPettingZooVecEnv, BanditEnv, train_on_policy, train_off_policy, train_offline, train_bandits, train_multi_agent_* APIs, or AgileRL training YAML configs.
scenarios.best_for: Classical and multi-agent AgileRL training setup, evolutionary HPO, evolvable network configuration, replay/offline/bandit data handling, PettingZoo wrappers, and safe smoke checks before long RL runs.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use generic RL environment skills for PettingZoo/Gymnasium environment authoring without AgileRL, other RL library skills for Stable-Baselines3/CleanRL/Tianshou-specific APIs, and LLM post-training skills when the task is not using AgileRL's LLM algorithms.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose agilerl when the user is using AgileRL's package APIs, YAML configs, evolvable architecture/HPO features, or AgileRL-specific training helpers rather than a different reinforcement learning framework.

scenarios.title: LLM Post-Training and RLHF Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM post-training tasks involving GRPO, DPO, SFT, PPO, REINFORCE, reward environments, rollout backends, vLLM, DeepSpeed, PEFT, and preference or reasoning optimization.
scenarios.role: AgileRL-specific guidance for LLM RL fine-tuning and post-training workflows implemented by AgileRL algorithms and trainers.
scenarios.read_when: Use when the request names AgileRL plus GRPO, CISPO, GSPO, DPO, SFT, LLM PPO, LLM REINFORCE, AgileRL LLM envs, `finetune_llm_reasoning`, `finetune_llm_preference`, `finetune_llm_multiturn`, `finetune_llm_sft`, vLLM sleep/wake handoff, or `agilerl[llm]` optional dependencies.
scenarios.best_for: Planning AgileRL LLM fine-tuning configs, optional dependency checks, reasoning/preference/multiturn/SFT trainer selection, checkpoint/quantization handling, and safe dry-run validation without model downloads.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use other RLHF or LLM fine-tuning skills when the package is TRL, OpenRLHF, verl, Axolotl, LlamaFactory, ms-swift, or a serving-only stack and AgileRL is not involved.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose agilerl for LLM post-training only when AgileRL's algorithms, trainers, configs, or optional `[llm]` extras are part of the workflow.
